title: RLHF — How AI Learns Human Preferences
description: How do you teach AI what 'good' means when you can't write it as a formula? RLHF lets humans show their preferences through comparisons, training a reward model that guides language models toward more helpful, safer, and more natural responses. We break down the full pipeline — from human rankings to reward models to reinforcement learning — and explore why this technique powers ChatGPT, Claude, and the modern AI assistants you use every day.
